channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Allen and Bills overcome Rodgers' Hail Mary and beat Jets 23-20 to take control in AFC East
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills were expecting to go into halftime against the New York Jets with a 10-point lead and all the momentum. That changed with one eye-popping pass by Aaron Rodgers that sent the Jets and their fans into a frenzy and had social media buzzing.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: 76ers' free agent pickup Paul George leaves preseason win with hyperextended left knee
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers prized free agent acquisition Paul George left Monday’s preseason game against Atlanta with a hyperextended left knee.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hendrick Motorsports declines to appeal Alex Bowman's disqualification from NASCAR playoffs
item.description: Hendrick Motorsports says it will not appeal Alex Bowman’s disqualification at Charlotte Motor Speedway that eliminated him from NASCAR title contention.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lindor homers as Mets stop Dodgers' scoreless streak in 7-3 win, head to NY with NLCS tied 1-1
item.description: Francisco Lindor and Mark Vientos homered as the New York Mets stopped the Los Angeles Dodgers’ record-tying postseason scoreless streak in a 7-3 victory, tying the NL Championship Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 49ers’ Ricky Pearsall practices for first time since San Francisco shooting
item.description: Wide receiver Ricky Pearsall resumed practicing Monday with the 49ers, six weeks after being shot through the chest by an attempted robber in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers' Flaherty shares NLCS Game 1 'moment' with mother
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers' major trade-deadline acquisition from this summer is already worth it. Jack Flaherty was the star of the show in Game 1 of the NLCS between L.A. and the New York Mets, as he pitched an electric seven shutout innings while giving up just two hits in a 9-0 win.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa expected to play again this season
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa is expected to play football again in 2024 after being diagnosed with his third concussion in two years earlier this season.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni's spat with fans is 'clown behavior,' Super Bowl champ says
item.description: Super Bowl champion Damien Woody called out Philadelphia Eagles head coach for trash talking fans after a four-point win over the Cleveland Browns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kansas tops AP Top 25 preseason men's basketball poll ahead of Alabama, defending champion UConn
item.description: Kansas was picked first in the AP Top 25 preseason men’s basketball poll Monday, getting the No. 1 nod on half of the 60 ballots from a national media panel to start the season ahead of Alabama and two-time defending national champion UConn. Kansas scooped up 30 first-place votes from the AP panel.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports' college football winners and losers: Week 7
item.description: The seventh week of the 2024 college football season came and went on Saturday. The grueling matchups yielded these winners and losers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Tropicana demolition in Las Vegas makes way for A's stadium
item.description: (KRON) -- Tropicana Las Vegas was demolished early Wednesday morning, making way for a proposed baseball stadium for the Athletics. The Tropicana implosion happened at around 2:30 a.m. on the Las Vegas strip, with the A’s logo lighting up the sky as both hotel towers came down.
item.dc:creator: Michael Thomas, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers pitcher robbed at California racetrack: Report
item.description: It's unclear when the incident occurred at Santa Anita Park, located 17 miles northeast of downtown Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers pitcher reportedly robbed of luxury watch at Southern California racetrack
item.description: Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler was reportedly robbed of a luxury watch at a horse racing track in what appeared to be a grand theft spree perpetrated by multiple organized groups.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Chicago Fire FC names Gregg Berhalter, former U.S. Men's National Team coach, as director of football and head coach
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago Fire FC has hired former U.S. Men's National Soccer Team head coach Gregg Berhalter as its head coach and director of football, the Major League Soccer team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
